title: Breakfast or lunch?
question: 把今天课文的情绪、放进你自己最近一次类似的经历——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景的空都填上、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: 老师小时候有一次寒假、奶奶下午两点来家里、推门看见我还在被窝里——Do you always get up so late?

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 周末睡到中午、爸妈喊吃饭
options.english_template: Last Saturday I ___ . When my mom called me to lunch, I was still in bed.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 暑假窝在被窝里到下午
options.english_template: During the summer holiday, I often ___ lunchtime, because there was nothing to do in the morning.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 亲戚突然来访、自己还在吃早饭
options.english_template: My aunt suddenly came to see me, but I ___ . She was very surprised.
